★ Meet Our Hero ★
Mr. Ledger O'Nobreak
Senior Accountant  |  Perpetually Drowning in Work
📬147 unread emails every single morning
📋Audit Reports, Compliance & Unit Reports stacked sky-high
🤖A colleague says: try I.M. Helpful-ish

"Can a Smart Agent truly free him from chaos —
or just give him a cleaner view of the mountain?"
✦  THE LEDGER CHRONICLES — EPISODE 1  ✦
The mountain was already waiting.
147 emails. 6 meetings. Zero breathing room.
Mr. Ledger O'Nobreak — same chaos, different day.
1

"You need I.M. Helpful-ish — it'll manage your day instead of it managing you."

A colleague steps in with one recommendation.
Meet the agent that could change everything.
2
The chaos became a task list.
Clarity — for the first time in months.
147 mails scanned. 3 critical flagged. Day compiled. Done.
3

"It highlights the tasks but doesn't perform them. I still do the heavy lifting!"

Organised? Yes. Free? Not yet.
The agent sees the mountain — but who will help him climb it?
4

◆ The Heavy Lift ◆
